assertions.description: NavigateEvent is exposed — the event type carrying the new sourceElement.
window.navigation is exposed — the dispatcher of NavigateEvent.
Constructing a NavigateEvent (or accessing it) exposes a sourceElement getter returning Element-or-null.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const e=new NavigateEvent('navigate',{destination:navigation.currentEntry,canIntercept:false,userInitiated:false,hashChange:false,signal:new AbortController().signal});return e.sourceElement===null||e.sourceElement instanceof Element;}catch(err){return 'sourceElement' in NavigateEvent.prototype;}})()

assertions.description: NavigateEvent.prototype.destination is exposed — the existing companion to sourceElement.
